ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields are clearly legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible. 3 pages.

multi_document_handling.pairing_method: Consignor match + identical content. Certificate file (Document A) page 1 is the certificate; pages 2-4 are embedded invoice copies. Document B is the separate invoice file with 3 pages. Verification performed against Document B.
multi_document_handling.notes: Certificate file (Document A) contains 1 certificate page and 3 invoice pages. The invoice in Document B is identical to the embedded invoice in the certificate file. Per rule 8.5.0, verification is performed against Document B (the separate invoice file).

lc_check.lc_verification_note: No LC/Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-25D-327128 which does not contain LC-related banking terminology.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: header 'Volvo Bus Corporation' with VAT No SE556197382601 and PARMA No 1009
Invoice page 1: footer 'Volvo Bus Corporation, SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden'
Invoice page 1: Buyer if Other than Consignee field 'Volvo Bus Corporation (VAT-Reg) GB'
Invoice page 2: header and footer same as page 1
Invoice page 3: header and footer same as page 1, plus certification text 'Volvo Bus Corporation' at bottom

pairing_validation.note: Consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' is the invoice issuer. Consignee 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' is identified in the invoice Mottagare/Consignee field. Certificate does not contain an explicit invoice number reference, but consignor and consignee both match. Pairing validated.

candidates.normalized_text: km 24 cairo ismailia desert road, el-obour city, cairo

Certificate page 1, box 6 (preceding goods description: '12 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE')

candidates.normalized_text: km 24 cairo ismailia desert road, el-obour city, cairo - egypt

candidates.normalized_text: volvo bus corporation (vat-reg) gb, wedgnock lane, cv34 5ya warwick

Invoice page 1, Ursprungsland/Country of Origin of Goods field

candidates.raw_text: the county of origin or manufacturer of the goods is Sweden

consignor.certificate_value: Volvo Bus Corporation, Gropegårdsgatan 1, 405 08, GOTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Volvo Bus Corporation, VAT No SE556197382601, SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Volvo Bus Corporation' in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Name found as invoice issuer in header on all pages
Company name 'Volvo Bus Corporation' is identical. Country Sweden verified via footer address 'SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden' and VAT prefix SE in 'SE556197382601'.

comparison_steps.description: Country Sweden confirmed via VAT prefix SE and explicit address 'Sweden' in footer

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found as invoice issuer
Verifiering – company name and country match

consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' is the invoice issuer, appearing in the invoice header on all pages. The VAT number SE556197382601 matches exactly between certificate (Foreign Exporter ID) and invoice. Country Sweden is confirmed via explicit address in footer and VAT prefix SE. Direct MATCH via rule 4.1.0.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'Volvo Bus Corporation, Gropegårdsgatan 1, 405 08, GOTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice text: 'Volvo Bus Corporation, VAT No SE556197382601' in header, 'Volvo Bus Corporation, SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden' in footer. Name match is exact. Country verified via multiple sources. No normalization needed beyond case.

consignee.certificate_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E, Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo, Egypt
consignee.invoice_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E., Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo - Egypt

comparison_steps.result: Invoice has explicit 'Mottagare/Consignee' field containing 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E.'

comparison_steps.description: The Mottagare/Consignee field is a primary field equivalent to 'Invoice to'/'Consignee'

comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' vs Invoice: 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E.' – identical after normalization (trailing period is punctuation)
Certificate: 'Egypt' (separate line under consignee). Invoice: 'Cairo - Egypt' in consignee address. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Grundregel – consignee identified in Mottagare/Consignee field
Verifiering – company name match after punctuation normalization

consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' matches invoice Mottagare/Consignee field 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E.' exactly (difference is only trailing period – punctuation normalization). Address is identical: 'Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo'. Country Egypt confirmed in both documents.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate: 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' without trailing dot. Invoice: 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E.' with trailing dot. This is a trivial punctuation difference. Addresses match. Country Egypt appears in both. No further normalization needed.

goods_description.certificate_value: 12 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE with 12 VIN numbers
goods_description.invoice_value: VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE, Quantity 12, with identical 12 VIN numbers

comparison_steps.description: No article numbers in certificate. Apply text matching for goods description.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate main product designation: 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE'. Invoice specification: 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE'. Exact match.
Main designation is 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE'. This exact string appears in both documents.

comparison_steps.description: Compare all 12 VIN numbers between certificate and invoice
comparison_steps.result: All 12 VIN numbers are identical in both documents: YV3T7U525TA224200, YV3T7U527TA224201, YV3T7U529TA224202, YV3T7U520TA224217, YV3T7U522TA224218, YV3T7U524TA224219, YV3T7U520TA224220, YV3T7U52XTA224256, YV3T7U521TA224257, YV3T7U529TA224278, YV3T7U520TA224279, YV3T7U527TA224280

rules_applied.description: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning – exact text match 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE'
Fordonsbeteckningar – 'bus chassis' is a vehicle description
VIN verification – all 12 VIN numbers match exactly

goods_description.motivation: The identity-bearing main designation 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE' appears exactly in both the certificate (box 6) and the invoice (Specifikation field). Additionally, all 12 VIN numbers listed in the certificate are identical to those in the invoice, providing unambiguous confirmation of product identity. No normalization needed.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate box 6: '12 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE' followed by 12 VIN numbers. Invoice specification: 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE' with quantity 12 and identical 12 VIN numbers. The '12' is quantity, not part of the product name. Exact text match on main designation plus exact VIN match. No article numbers to check.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains 'GW 72120 kg'. This is the verification basis per rule 4.4.2.1.
Search for numeric value 72120 in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice Bruttovikt/Gross Weight field shows '72120,00' (kg). Value 72120 matches exactly (72120,00 truncated to 72120 = same value).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate specifies 'GW' (Gross Weight). Invoice field is labeled 'Bruttovikt/Gross Weight (kg)'. Categories match.
Numeric value 72120 in certificate matches 72120.00 in invoice. Unit kg matches (both in kg). Weight category GW matches Bruttovikt/Gross Weight.
Certificate box 6 states '12 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS'. Invoice Antal/Quantity column shows 12.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity 'GW 72120 kg' is the verification basis
Förekomstkontroll – 72120 identified in invoice Gross Weight field
Numeric value and unit verified: 72120 kg GW in both

quantity.motivation: Certificate box 7 states 'GW 72120 kg'. Invoice Bruttovikt/Gross Weight (kg) field shows 72120,00. The numeric value 72120 matches exactly (72120,00 = 72120 after decimal truncation per rule 4.4.3). Weight category GW = Bruttovikt/Gross Weight. Unit kg matches. Additionally, the item count of 12 from certificate box 6 matches invoice Antal/Quantity of 12. Both quantities verified.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate: 'GW 72120 kg' in box 7. Invoice: '72120,00' in Bruttovikt/Gross Weight (kg) field. 72120.00 truncated = 72120. Exact match. GW = Gross Weight = Bruttovikt. Also verified: 12 pieces in certificate ('12 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE') matches invoice quantity 12.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Sweden (Ursprungsland/Country of Origin of Goods field)

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has dedicated field 'Ursprungsland/Country of Origin of Goods' containing 'Sweden'

comparison_steps.description: Invoice page 3 also contains certification text: 'the county of origin or manufacturer of the goods is Sweden'

rules_applied.description: Identifiering – explicit Ursprungsland/Country of Origin field in invoice

country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden'. Invoice has an explicit field 'Ursprungsland/Country of Origin of Goods' containing 'Sweden'. Exact match with no normalization required. Additionally confirmed by the certification statement on invoice page 3.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice field label 'Ursprungsland/Country of Origin of Goods': 'Sweden'. Exact string match. Further confirmed by page 3 text 'the county of origin or manufacturer of the goods is Sweden'. Single origin country, no mixed origins.

rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT_APPLICABLE – No LC reference found in certificate
APPLIED – Certificate from Document A page 1, Invoice from Document B pages 1-3. Certificate file also contains embedded invoice copies (pages 2-4) which are NOT used for verification.
PASS – Consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' matches invoice issuer. Consignee 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' matches invoice Mottagare field.
MATCH – 'Volvo Bus Corporation' found as invoice issuer in header on all pages
MATCH – exact name match, country Sweden verified via address and VAT prefix
APPLIED – Mottagare/Consignee field used as primary field
MATCH – name match after punctuation normalization
MATCH – 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE' exact match
APPLIED – GW 72120 kg used as verification basis
MATCH – 72120 found in Bruttovikt field as 72120,00
MATCH – Sweden in explicit Ursprungsland/Country of Origin field

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Volvo Bus Corporation, mottagaren Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E, varubeskrivningen VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE med 12 st chassin inklusive VIN-nummer, bruttovikten 72 120 kg och ursprungslandet Sverige stämmer exakt mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_notes: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) are verified as MATCH with high confidence. The certificate and invoice are from the same issuer (Volvo Bus Corporation), same consignee, same goods, same weight, same origin. VIN numbers provide unambiguous product identification.
non_blocking_notes: Certificate file also contained embedded invoice copies (pages 2-4) which were not used for verification per rule 8.5.0.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Volvo Bus Corporation, Gropegårdsgatan 1, 405 08, GOTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Volvo Bus Corporation, VAT No SE556197382601, SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Konsignor identifierad som fakturautställare via koncernstruktur (4.1.0). Företagsnamn exakt match. Land Sverige verifierat via adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Volvo Bus Corporation' är identisk med fakturans utställare som anges i sidhuvudet på samtliga sidor. VAT-nummer SE556197382601 överensstämmer exakt. Land Sverige bekräftas genom fakturans adressfält och VAT-prefix.

sections.certificate_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E, Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo, Egypt
sections.invoice_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E., Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo - Egypt
sections.rule_applied: Mottagare identifierad i fakturans Mottagare/Consignee-fält. Företagsnamn match efter punktuationsnormalisering. Land Egypten bekräftat.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' återfinns i fakturans Mottagare/Consignee-fält som 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E.' – skillnaden är enbart en avslutande punkt. Adress och land (Egypten) överensstämmer.

sections.certificate_value: 12 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE med 12 VIN-nummer
sections.invoice_value: VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE, Antal 12, med identiska 12 VIN-nummer
sections.rule_applied: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE' exakt matchad. Samtliga 12 VIN-nummer identiska.
sections.motivation: Produktbeteckningen 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE' är identisk i certifikat och faktura. Alla 12 VIN-nummer som listas i certifikatet återfinns identiskt i fakturan, vilket ger entydig produktidentifiering.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll: numeriskt värde 72120 identifierat i fakturans bruttoviktfält. Viktkategori GW = Gross Weight. Enhet kg.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet 'GW 72120 kg' (ruta 7) överensstämmer med fakturans bruttovikt 72120,00 kg. Viktkategori GW matchar 'Bruttovikt/Gross Weight'. Även antalet 12 st från ruta 6 matchar fakturans kvantitetskolumn.

sections.rule_applied: Exakt matchning: 'Sweden' i certifikatets ruta 3 matchar 'Sweden' i fakturans Ursprungsland-fält.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' (ruta 3) återfinns explicit i fakturans dedikerade fält 'Ursprungsland/Country of Origin of Goods' som 'Sweden'. Ytterligare bekräftat i fakturans intygandetext på sida 3.

human_readable_report.conclusion: Samtliga kontrollpunkter uppfyller kraven för MATCH. Dokumentparet bedöms som IDENTICAL och rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. All confidence values >= 0.85. No inconsistencies detected.
